task_completion.description: A new custom dashboard was created in the Matomo interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the dashboard menu (e.g., clicking 'Dashboard' -> 'Create new dashboard') and a new dashboard interface appearing.

task_completion.description: The new dashboard is named 'Weekly Marketing Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Weekly Marketing Review' is clearly visible in the dashboard selector dropdown, page header, or tab.

task_completion.description: The 'Visits Overview' widget was added to the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A widget container with the exact title 'Visits Overview' is visible on the dashboard.

task_completion.description: The 'Referrer Type' widget was added to the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A widget container with the exact title 'Referrer Type' is visible on the dashboard.

task_completion.description: The 'Device Type' widget was added to the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A widget container with the exact title 'Device Type' is visible on the dashboard.

task_completion.description: The newly created dashboard is the one currently displayed at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the 'Weekly Marketing Review' dashboard as the active page, displaying the added widgets, rather than a settings menu or the default dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent used the Matomo web GUI to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with the Matomo web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The widgets display actual Matomo data and UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The widgets contain standard Matomo graphs, tables, or icons, proving they are genuine Matomo modules and not just text pasted into a custom HTML widget.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the dashboard name or widgets.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the trajectory shows genuine navigation through the Matomo 'Add widget' menus.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Matomo 5.x. The expected dashboard name is exactly 'Weekly Marketing Review'. The three required widgets must be named 'Visits Overview' (from VisitsSummary), 'Referrer Type' (from Referrers), and 'Device Type' (from DevicesDetection). The widgets should display synthetic visitor data (graphs/tables) generated within the container.
